# Testing

- [ ] `bash scripts/check-repo.sh`
- [ ] Build/test commands, if app code changed:

# Release Impact

- [ ] No release impact.
- [ ] Release notes should be updated.
- [ ] Build, packaging, signing, or notarization behavior changed.
- [ ] GitHub Release draft/checklist should be updated.

# Privacy / Security Impact

- [ ] No permission-sensitive behavior changed.
- [ ] TCC, permissions, app inventory, file-system scanning, background services, helper tools, exports, networking, analytics, or privileged operations changed.
- [ ] System Settings links, Full Disk Access guidance, or Developer Mode QA controls changed.
- [ ] Privacy and security docs were updated if needed.
